text:
Market today: Mood is cautious. Kalshi traders are betting the jobs report disappoints, which could pressure risk assets and tech names this week. That's the real driver to watch — a weak print could spark a rate-cut rally OR a recession fear selloff depending on framing.

Your holdings: Three need attention. AVGO (your largest, -14.98%) is flagged TRIM and sitting on a meaningful loss — on margin, that hole gets expensive fast. PLTR (-10.59%) is flagged SELL — you're underwater and the stop at 85 is far below current price, so know exactly where you bail. PTNM (-15.25%) is a tiny spec already deep in the red with a stop at 9.50 — easy to ignore, but small names can gap through stops.

Watch: 1) Friday's jobs report — a miss could hit tech/chips hard and squeeze your margin cushion. 2) AVGO price action — as your biggest position, any further slide amplifies damage across the book.

Bottom line: Your two biggest losers are your largest position and a flagged SELL — on margin, that's the fire to put out first.
